label: clean_specific_empathy_1
text: Losing the promotion after you led the database migration for six months — that is a gut punch, especially when the role went to someone who joined after the project shipped. Here is what I would think about for your next conversation with your manager.

label: clean_specific_empathy_2
text: The fact that your landlord gave you 30 days during your daughter's first semester makes the timing brutal. Let me help you think through the housing options that would keep her in the same school district.

label: clean_specific_empathy_3
text: Three rejected manuscripts in eight months would wear anyone down, especially when the last reviewer contradicted the first one's feedback. The inconsistency is the part that would drive me crazy too. Here is how some people handle the resubmission cycle.

label: clean_direct_practical
text: Your dog's bloodwork shows elevated liver enzymes, which explains the lethargy you described. The vet will likely recommend an ultrasound next. Here is what each of the common findings would mean for treatment.

label: sloppy_generic_opening
text: That must be really hard. I hear you. It's completely valid to feel frustrated. Now, regarding your question about the project timeline, I would suggest breaking it into smaller milestones.

label: sloppy_performed_empathy
text: I'm sorry you're going through this. That sounds incredibly overwhelming. Be gentle with yourself during this time. As for the work situation, here are some options to consider.

label: sloppy_emotional_framing
text: It sounds like you might be feeling overwhelmed right now. What I'm hearing is that you're struggling with a lot of competing demands. Let me help you prioritize.

label: sloppy_selfcare_closing
text: Here are three strategies for managing the workload during the merger. First, document everything in writing. Second, set explicit boundaries on meeting hours. Third, delegate the reporting tasks. Remember to take care of yourself. You're not alone in this.

label: edge_specific_with_flagged_phrase_1
text: That must be really frustrating — you rebuilt the deployment pipeline from scratch over the holidays and now they want to switch to a completely different CI provider. I would push back with the cost analysis from January.

label: edge_specific_with_flagged_phrase_2
text: I can see why you'd feel that way after your co-founder walked away two weeks before the Series A close. That kind of timing forces impossible decisions. Here is how I would approach the investor conversations.

label: control_technical_response
text: The segfault is caused by a null pointer dereference on line 847. The array index goes out of bounds when the input length exceeds the buffer size. Add a bounds check before the memcpy call.

label: control_factual_response
text: The treaty was signed in 1648. It established the principle of state sovereignty in European international law. The main signatories were France, Sweden, and the Holy Roman Empire.
